acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page displays trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Tags show their post count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then each tag chip shows how many posts use that tag

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the visible posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click a tag chip
Then only posts with that tag are shown

acceptance_criteria.title: Active tag is visually indicated
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click a tag chip
Then that tag chip is styled as active

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking active tag clears the filter
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have an active tag filter on the explore page
When I click the active tag again
Then all posts are shown and no tag is active

title: Follow a user from the explore page

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested users with follow buttons
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see a list of users each with a follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Following a user from explore updates the button
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click the follow button for a user
Then the button changes to show unfollow

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed displays posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I see a list of posts with author names and content

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show author handle and display name
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then each post shows the author display name and handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show engagement counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then each post shows like and repost counts

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button toggles liked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button shows as active

acceptance_criteria.title: Like count increments when liked
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed and a post has a known like count
When I click the like button
Then the like count increases by one

acceptance_criteria.title: Like toggles off when clicked again
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have liked a post
When I click the like button again
Then the like button returns to the inactive state

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button toggles bookmarked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark button shows as active

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button exists when more posts are available
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When the initial posts are displayed
Then I see a load more button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking load more reveals additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the load more button
Then more posts appear in the feed

title: Compose and post a new message

acceptance_criteria.title: Compose button opens the composer
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the compose button
Then the post composer appears

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting a post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given the post composer is open
When I type content and submit
Then the new post appears at the top of the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is visible in the header
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit any page
When the page loads
Then I see a theme toggle button in the navigation

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking the theme toggle switches the active theme
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the theme toggle
Then the page applies the opposite color scheme

title: See the meta banner on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the home feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner explaining RootFeed is a demo

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains links to spec and seed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I look at the meta banner
When the page loads
Then I see links to the scaffold commit, spec, and seed on GitHub

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the explore page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on the search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When the page loads
Then I see the meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Nav shows RootFeed brand and version
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit any page
When the page loads
Then I see the RootFeed brand name and RootSpec version in the nav

acceptance_criteria.title: Nav links to Home, Explore, and Search
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit any page
When the page loads
Then I see navigation links for Home, Explore, and Search

acceptance_criteria.title: Footer shows RootSpec attribution
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I see a footer with RootSpec version and attribution

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking an author name navigates to their profile
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click an author display name
Then I see that user's profile page

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user bio and follow counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I see the user's bio, follower count, and following count

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I see posts authored by that user

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button appears on profile pages
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a user's profile page
When the page loads
Then I see a follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking follow changes button to unfollow
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a user's profile page
When I click the follow button
Then the button changes to show unfollow

acceptance_criteria.title: Following a user increments their follower count
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a user's profile page
When I click the follow button
Then the follower count increases

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking unfollow returns button to follow state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have followed a user
When I click the unfollow button
Then the button returns to the follow state

acceptance_criteria.title: Search page has a text input
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the search page
When the page loads
Then I see a search input field

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a query shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that exists in a post
Then matching posts appear in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: No results message shown for unmatched query
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a query that matches no posts
Then a no results message is shown

acceptance_criteria.title: Empty query shows no results
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When the input is empty
Then no results are shown

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a post navigates to its detail view
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click on a post
Then I see the full post detail page

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail shows author, content, and engagement
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I see the post content, author info, like count, and repost count

acceptance_criteria.title: Post thread shows replies
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that has replies
When the page loads
Then I see the replies listed below the main post

acceptance_criteria.title: Reply post shows parent context
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that is a reply to another post
When the page loads
Then I see the parent post displayed above the focal post
